Aries.overview: The Sun in Gemini this month spotlights communication, errands, and nearby connections for Aries. Jupiter in Cancer grows opportunities around home, roots, and private emotional life. Saturn in Aries structures progress in identity, vitality, and first impressions — discipline beats speed.
Aries.love: Relational clarity improves when you name needs early in the month rather than hoping they are inferred.
Aries.career: Negotiate scope and worth early; late-month pressure makes the same terms harder to land.
Aries.health: Rhythm beats intensity — sleep and movement on a schedule outperform heroic one-off efforts.
Aries.methodNote: Month scaffold from mid-month ephemeris + solar houses; daily email uses getDailyHoroscope per send date.
